data.body:
[Webview Event] C&C Cleaning Report!

The C&C students have arrived at the Millennium Expo to carry out a special cleaning mission.
Check out their cleaning report from the Millennium Expo and claim your event rewards!

➡️ Learn more: https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3218&thread=3024239

#BlueArchive
